title: Traveling Merchant
description: A cheerful merchant waves you over to his colorful wagon. "Rare goods! Honest prices!" he proclaims, though his grin suggests otherwise.

options.title: Buy Supplies
options.description: Purchase useful provisions for the road ahead.

options.title: Haggle
options.description: Negotiate relentlessly until the merchant finally gives in.

options.title: Steal His Goods
options.description: While the merchant is distracted, you quietly help yourself to his valuables.
